note: Stage-1 ROUND 3 (audio, bGPT, ljspeech). Round-2 CONVERGED lr=3e-4 (5e-4/1e-3 diverge -> negative delta), lora_r=32 (64 overfits), attn-only (MLP is fragile: fine at 3e-4, blows up at higher lr). Those are FROZEN here. Only the two mild remaining edges are swept: train_interval (was 2>4; test 1) x epochs (nsynth liked 5>3). 4 runs -> then freeze. ljspeech is the report-speech dev; nsynth (single-instrument, homogeneous) showed a much bigger delta (~5.6% vs ~2.5%) — that spread is a paper result, tune here on ljspeech.
